user.title: Set up Notification Dispatcher
user.description: Create the dispatcher. Add people from the integration options afterwards.

add_person.title: Add person
add_person.description: Choose a Home Assistant person and that person's mobile app targets. Enter time windows as 08:00-22:00; empty means no delivery on weekdays/weekends and no quiet hours for DND. Critical notifications are always delivered.

edit_details.title: Edit person
edit_details.description: Choose a Home Assistant person and that person's mobile app targets. Enter time windows as 08:00-22:00; empty means no delivery on weekdays/weekends and no quiet hours for DND. Critical notifications are always delivered.

error.missing_notify_target: Add at least one notify target.
error.duplicate_person: This person is already configured in the dispatcher.
